title: Add UTC timezone offset display to local time in Map Settings

requirements.summary: Display UTC offset alongside local time in WebsiteLayoutPanel for the default search location
acceptanceCriteria: The local time display includes the UTC offset in parentheses format '(UTC +X)' or '(UTC -X)'
The offset accurately reflects the timezone of the selected default search location
The format matches the example: 'February 24, 2026 at 9:11 AM (UTC +8)'
The change applies only to the specific element identified by the provided XPath

file_operations.description: Modify the local time display in the WebsiteLayoutPanel component to append the UTC offset in the format '(UTC +X)' or '(UTC -X)'. Use the Intl.DateTimeFormat API to detect the timezone offset for the defaultSearchPlace location. Update the display element (the <strong> tag showing local time) to include both the formatted date/time and the calculated UTC offset. Ensure the offset calculation handles DST correctly and displays positive offsets with a '+' sign and negative offsets with a '-' sign. The implementation should use existing timezone utilities if available in the codebase.
